text.title: puppeteer-stealth-proxy Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for puppeteer-stealth-proxy as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running unbounded retries on 429 responses from managed browser services (Browserless, ScrapingBee) without a circuit breaker.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Unbounded retries on rate-limit responses burn budget fast. Set --max-retries=2 and circuit-break on 4xx; surface the error to the caller instead of looping silently.
